creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
# pkg which /usr/local/etc/ssl/cert.pem
/usr/local/etc/ssl/cert.pem was installed by package libressl-2.2.2

Im rename /usr/local/etc/ssl/cert.pem to _cert.pem
then create simlink
# ls -l /usr/local/etc/ssl/cert.pem.sample 
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel    38B Aug 15 03:00:32 2015 /usr/local/etc/ssl/cert.pem@ -> /usr/local/share/certs/ca-root-nss.crt

this fix problem.
What is correct way to fix?
